chief_complaint: A 37-year-old woman with untreated hyperthyroidism and bipolar disorder presents with mania in the context of thyroid storm.
history: The patient has a history of bipolar disorder and untreated hyperthyroidism. She was admitted for mania and developed catatonic symptoms after receiving low-dose haloperidol.
exam: No specific vital signs or physical examination findings are provided.
labs: No specific laboratory results are provided, but the patient was found to have hyperthyroidism.
